problem id: 546f9036
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  11110001 -> 00100011
  00001011 -> 01100000
  01010000 -> 00000001
  10110011 -> 01100010
  00010011 -> 01100000
  01101000 -> 00000001
  01011100 -> 10000001
  00111110 -> 11000000

query: 01000101
predicted answer: 10100001
